name: JoAi: Create Memory

description.en: Save a piece of knowledge or fact as a memory for your agent.
description.de: Speichere ein Wissen oder eine Tatsache als Erinnerung für deinen Agenten.
description.es: Save a piece of knowledge or fact as a memory for your agent.
description.fr: Save a piece of knowledge or fact as a memory for your agent.
description.ro: Save a piece of knowledge or fact as a memory for your agent.
description.it: Save a piece of knowledge or fact as a memory for your agent.

bot: Use this when the user shares a fact, preference, or piece of knowledge they want their agent to remember. The content should be a concise, self-contained statement.

inputs.name: Content

description.en: The fact or knowledge to remember
description.de: Das Wissen oder die Tatsache zum Merken
description.es: The fact or knowledge to remember
description.fr: The fact or knowledge to remember
description.ro: The fact or knowledge to remember
description.it: The fact or knowledge to remember

inputs.bot: A concise, self-contained statement of the fact or knowledge to remember.

inputs.name: Category
inputs.bot: Optional category like preference, fact, experience, or relationship.
Optional comma-separated tags to categorize this memory.

inputs.name: Team Visible

description.en: Whether this memory is visible to the whole team
description.de: Ob diese Erinnerung für das ganze Team sichtbar ist
description.es: Whether this memory is visible to the whole team
description.fr: Whether this memory is visible to the whole team
description.ro: Whether this memory is visible to the whole team
description.it: Whether this memory is visible to the whole team

inputs.bot: Set to true if this memory should be visible to all team members (e.g. shared context).
